mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_topics ( session_id, main_topic, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{topic}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ) ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET main_topic = EXCLUDED.main_topic, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)

INSERT INTO session_topic_questions ( session_topic_id, order_no, content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{sessionTopicId}, #{question.orderNo}, #{question.content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS sessionId, s.title AS sessionTitle, s.starts_at AS startsAt, s.location AS location, st.id AS sessionTopicId, st.main_topic AS mainTopic FROM sessions s INNER JOIN session_topics st ON st.session_id = s.id WHERE s.id = #{sessionId}

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.order_no AS orderNo, q.content AS content FROM session_topic_questions q INNER JOIN session_topics st ON st.id = q.session_topic_id WHERE st.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY q.order_no ASC
